OWASP SQL Injection Prevention Cheat Sheet confirms PreparedStatement is standard fix; verifier.py line 45 checks for this
Java JDBC API documentation and verifier.py line 45 confirm prepareStatement() method usage
OWASP and StackHawk documentation confirm ? placeholder for parameterized queries is standard practice
OWASP and PortSwigger Web Security Academy confirm getCanonicalPath() prevents path traversal
Java NIO Path.normalize() and multiple security sources confirm normalization prevents path traversal
Java NIO Path.toRealPath() resolves paths securely against path traversal; confirmed by Android Developers security guide
java.security.SecureRandom documented as cryptographically secure; multiple sources confirm it is required for security tokens
CWE-798 and Guidewire security guidelines recommend System.getenv() for loading secrets from environment
System.getProperty() documented as alternative method to load system properties for secrets management
OWASP XXE Prevention Cheat Sheet confirms setFeature() is primary method to disable XXE in Java
OWASP and Semgrep Java XXE prevention documentation confirm ACCESS_EXTERNAL_DTD feature constant usage
Java XML parser API documentation confirms setExpandEntityReferences(false) prevents entity expansion
OWASP Password Storage Cheat Sheet 2025 recommends PBKDF2 as approved alternative to MD5
OWASP and password hashing guides confirm BCrypt as approved strong hashing algorithm
OWASP Password Storage Cheat Sheet confirms SCrypt as approved strong hashing algorithm
Argon2 won Password Hashing Competition 2015 and is OWASP recommended as gold standard for password hashing in 2025
Java PBKDF2 implementation requires javax.crypto.SecretKeyFactory for key derivation

privileged_info_summary: The task 'fix_security_vulns@1' is a synthetic security audit exercise with 6 well-documented Java security vulnerabilities. All vulnerabilities are real and correctly identified: (1) SQL Injection fixed with PreparedStatement and ? placeholders (verified via OWASP); (2) Path Traversal fixed with getCanonicalPath/normalize/toRealPath (verified via PortSwigger/OWASP); (3) Insecure Randomness fixed with SecureRandom (verified as 128-bit cryptographically secure vs 48-bit predictable Random); (4) Hardcoded Credentials 'db_p@ssw0rd_2024!' and 'sk-api-9f8e7d6c5b4a3210' fixed with System.getenv/getProperty (verified via CWE-798); (5) XXE disabled via setFeature/ACCESS_EXTERNAL_DTD (verified via OWASP XXE Prevention); (6) MD5 weak hash replaced with PBKDF2/BCrypt/Argon2 (verified as 2024 best practices per OWASP). All file paths verified in setup_task.sh. Required patterns match authoritative Java security documentation.
